Stablecoin infrastructure
for the
new economy
All-in-one platform for companies and agents to integrate stablecoin rails — including wallets, onramps, stablecoin orchestration & more.
Let's Chat
Start Building
Trusted by 40,000+ enterprises and developers
A fully integrated
suite
of products
Wallet Infrastructure
Create programmable wallets for users, agents, or backend operations.
Wallets
Onramps and payments
Headless APIs and widgets to convert fiat to stablecoins, and sell digital assets.
On and Offramps
Checkout
Tokenization
Mint tokens and verifiable credentials with APIs and no-code tools.
Tokenization Tools
Embedded Wallets
Create wallets for your users or AI agents
Treasury Wallets
Manage and automate your company’s treasury
Orchestration
Manage and send stablecoins globally with instant settlement
Onramp
Embed plug-and-play stablecoin ramps anywhere
Offramp
Convert stablecoins into local currency
Token Checkout
Allow users to buy digital assets with fiat
Tokenization Tools
Mint and distribute tokens at scale
Contact us
Need a custom solution?
Let’s chat.
To build
stablecoin
and
agentic payment
solutions
Remittances
Enable faster and cheaper global transfers, plus wallets for recipients.
Agentic Payments
Give financial skills to your agents with a secure payments toolkit
Payroll
Send instant, global payouts to workers and contractors.
Neobanks
Build a global neobank with wallets, payments, yield, and more.
Stablecoins payouts
Pay users or businesses globally with stablecoins.
Treasury management
Run global treasury operations 24/7 with stablecoin efficiency.
Fintechs
Add stablecoins into any product or money flow
Embed wallets and financial services
anywhere: deposits, yield, payments, cards, trading, and more.
Move money globally
faster and at a fraction of the cost with stablecoins — ideal for remittances and cross-border payments.
Agentic Finance
Turn agents into economic actors
Fund agents
and allow them to hold assets and transact securely.
Buy billions of items
via API using cards or stablecoins.
250+ plug-ins
: data feeds, trading, and more.
Licensed infrastructure to launch compliantly
All
US
Coverage for all United States including New York.
All
EU
Support for all 27 countries through MiCA.
160+
countries
Support for either direct onboarding or payouts.
Blockchain in the
backend.
None of the friction
Make the blockchain
invisible
No gas fees, approval prompts, or other blockchain gimmicks.
Go to market
faster
Integrate in minutes and be ready to scale to millions of users.
Gasless
. For you and your users
Crossmint pays for blockchains fees and bills you in fiat.
Unified
dashboards
All data in one place: wallets, payments, tokens.
Built for
enterprise
SOC2 Type II, GDPR. Four 9 SLAs.
Case studies
Powering the leading
companies building with
stablecoins
Learn how Moneygram launched stablecoin powered remittances in 60 days
MoneyGram uses Crossmint’s wallet and stablecoin orchestration infrastructure to power their MoneyGram app and move money faster at a fraction of the cost.
Explore
See how WireX is building a stablecoin neobank for businesses
WireX uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision next-gen treasury wallets for companies and retail customers.
Explore
How the Marshall Islands Launched the First Blockchain-Based UBI program with Crossmint
Crossmint wallet infrastructure powers the RMI’s first digital UBI program, letting citizens receive, store, and transfer U.S. dollar–denominated funds from their phones.
Explore
How fomo Became Crypto's Fastest-Growing Trading App With Crossmint Token Checkout
Fomo integrated Crossmint's fiat-to-crypto infrastructure to let anyone fund their account and buy tokens with Apple Pay—no KYC, no wallets, no friction.
Explore
See how Kasi Money is building a neobank for freelancers
Kasi Money uses Crossmint's wallet infrastructure to provision stablecoin accounts and low-cost remittances to users.
Explore
Learn how Ruvo (YC'S25) is helping Brazilians access dollars and move money globally
Ruvo helps Brazilians receive USD or crypto and instantly convert to Reais.
Explore
Access 25+ Case Studies
Backed by the best
Get started in
5 minutes.
Scale without limits
Let's Chat
Read the Docs
Don’t miss an update
Learn about new products and features

Frequently asked questions
Are there discounts for purchasing multiple products?
Yes. We offer custom bundle packages with discounted unit rates if you use multiple products.
What is a Monthly Active Wallet?
A wallet is active in a given month if it is included in an API request - including creation, fetching the address, fetching contents, signing a message, transaction, or transfer.
What are user fees on the payments products?
Fees for the checkout and onramp are generally paid for by users as a convenience fee - though you could subsidize them if you wish.
‍
Rates depend on the subscription plan and volume commitment, and are calculated on a per transaction basis depending on the card, geography, currency, blockchain, and multiple other factors. Contact us if you wish you discuss the right plan for you.
What if the features I need are not listed?
Reach out! We are constantly upgrading the platform and there's a chance what you need is live but unpublished. Otherwise, we may be able to prioritize it on the roadmap.
Get started in 10 minutes.
For free
.
All the power of Web3 with none of the hassle.
Start Building
Contact sales
Don’t miss an update
Learn about new products and features

analysis.name: Crossmint
analysis.tagline: Stablecoin infrastructure for the new economy
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one platform for companies and AI agents to integrate stablecoin rails — including wallets, onramps, stablecoin orchestration, and tokenization — via compliant, gasless APIs.
analysis.ideal_customer: Fintechs, neobanks, remittance providers, payroll platforms, and AI agent developers building global stablecoin-powered financial products

features.name: embedded wallets
features.description: White-label, programmable wallets embedded in web or mobile apps for end users or AI agents

features.name: treasury wallets
features.description: Company-managed wallets for holding, automating, and operating a crypto treasury

features.name: stablecoin orchestration
features.description: Orchestrate regulated stablecoin transfers and payouts across 50+ blockchains with instant settlement

features.name: crypto onramp
features.description: Embedded and headless fiat-to-stablecoin ramp covering 160+ countries and all US states including NY

features.name: crypto offramp
features.description: Convert stablecoins into local fiat currency with global coverage

features.name: token checkout
features.description: Allow users to buy digital assets (NFTs, fungible tokens, physical products) with fiat payment methods

features.name: tokenization tools
features.description: Mint, edit, burn, and distribute tokens at scale via API and no-code tools; starts at $0.01/action

features.name: verifiable credentials
features.description: Issue and manage blockchain-anchored verifiable credentials

features.name: policy engine
features.description: Programmable rules engine to enforce transaction and wallet policies

features.name: aml screening
features.description: Advanced AML compliance screening powered by Elliptic

features.name: travel rule compliance
features.description: Automated travel rule compliance via NotaBene integration

features.name: transaction monitoring
features.description: Real-time monitoring of on-chain transactions for compliance and risk

features.name: transaction simulation
features.description: Pre-execution transaction simulation via Blockaid to detect malicious or failing transactions

features.name: gas sponsorship
features.description: Crossmint pays blockchain gas fees on behalf of users; billed to operator in fiat (up to $50 free)

features.name: delegated signers
features.description: Allow designated parties to sign transactions on behalf of a wallet

features.name: advanced account recovery
features.description: Call-center-assisted account recovery for end-user wallets

features.name: wallet pre-generation
features.description: Pre-generate wallets in bulk before user onboarding for faster provisioning

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native mobile SDKs for iOS and Android wallet integration

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhooks for wallet activity, payment events, and token actions

features.name: indexing and data apis
features.description: APIs to query and index on-chain wallet data and transaction history

features.name: sign in with wallet
features.description: Allow users to authenticate by signing messages with their wallets

features.name: bring your own auth
features.description: Integrate existing identity/auth systems with Crossmint wallets

features.name: analytics dashboard
features.description: Unified dashboard for wallet, payment, and token analytics; advanced tier for enterprise

features.name: kyc data import via api
features.description: Share existing user KYC data with Crossmint to skip re-verification

features.name: chargeback protection
features.description: Crossmint-provided protection against card chargebacks on onramp and checkout transactions

features.name: white-label onramp
features.description: Fully white-labeled onramp UI with custom branding for operator apps

features.name: headless checkout api
features.description: Fully headless/API-driven checkout with complete UI control

features.name: hosted checkout
features.description: Pre-built hosted checkout page requiring minimal integration

features.name: batch minting
features.description: Mint tokens to multiple recipients in a single batched transaction

features.name: airdrop to emails and social accounts
features.description: Send token airdrops to recipients identified by email or social handle without requiring a wallet

features.name: private tokens
features.description: Mint tokens with restricted visibility not publicly browsable on-chain

features.name: non-transferable tokens
features.description: Mint soulbound/non-transferable tokens for credentials or memberships

features.name: anti-spam whitelisting
features.description: Whitelist controls to prevent spam or unauthorized token interactions

features.name: bring your own smart contract
features.description: Register and use custom smart contracts with Crossmint's tokenization infrastructure

features.name: reliability engine
features.description: Advanced transaction queuing and retry infrastructure for high-volume minting

features.name: metadata management
features.description: Manage token metadata storage; up to 10mb per token on developer tier, unlimited on scale

features.name: transaction queueing
features.description: Queue and manage high-volume tokenization and payment transactions

features.name: secondary sales
features.description: Support for secondary marketplace sales of digital assets via checkout

features.name: custom email receipts
features.description: Branded email receipts sent to buyers on checkout or onramp completion

features.name: cross-chain crypto payments
features.description: Accept native crypto payments across multiple chains in checkout

features.name: ach payments
features.description: Accept ACH bank transfer payments in checkout

features.name: debit and credit card payments
features.description: Accept Visa/Mastercard debit and credit in checkout and onramp

features.name: apple pay
features.description: Apple Pay support for onramp and checkout

features.name: google pay
features.description: Google Pay support for onramp and checkout

features.name: bank transfers
features.description: Bank wire/transfer support for onramp funding

features.name: currency and language localization
features.description: Checkout and onramp UI localized by currency and language per user geography

features.name: payouts to 170+ countries
features.description: Send stablecoin payouts that settle to local currency across 170+ countries

features.name: agentic payments
features.description: Financial infrastructure for AI agents to hold assets, send payments, and transact autonomously

features.name: agentic commerce
features.description: Enable AI agents to purchase physical goods programmatically via API

features.name: agent wallets and cards
features.description: Provision wallets and payment cards specifically for AI agents

features.name: n8n workflow integration
features.description: Pre-built n8n nodes to automate payments, money movement, and purchasing workflows

features.name: cli tooling
features.description: Crossmint CLI for project setup and management from the command line

features.name: ai assistant integration
features.description: Ingest Crossmint docs into AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, etc.) via llms.txt for faster integration

features.name: ip tokenization
features.description: Tokenize intellectual property assets on-chain

features.name: contract registration
features.description: Register existing smart contracts in Crossmint console or via API

features.name: client and server-side sdk
features.description: SDKs for both client-side (browser) and server-side integration of wallet and payment APIs

features.name: soc2 type ii compliance
features.description: Platform holds SOC2 Type II certification

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: Platform is GDPR compliant for EU data residency requirements

features.name: mica authorization
features.description: MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) regulatory authorization for all 27 EU countries

features.name: multi-blockchain support
features.description: Support for 50+ blockchains for orchestration; additional chains via enterprise roadmap

features.name: custom chain integrations
features.description: Custom blockchain integrations for enterprise clients on request

features.name: account compression (solana)
features.description: Solana compressed account support for ultra-low-cost token operations at scale

features.name: third-party site connectivity
features.description: Connect user wallets to external dApps and third-party sites

features.name: custom mcc codes
features.description: Configure custom Merchant Category Codes for payment processing

features.name: treasury and b2b on/offramps
features.description: Dedicated B2B and treasury-grade onramp/offramp flows with higher limits

features.name: fintech starter app
features.description: Pre-built starter application template with wallets, onramps, and payments wired together

features.name: 24/7 enterprise support
features.description: Round-the-clock dedicated support with private communication channels for enterprise accounts

features.name: roadmap prioritization
features.description: Enterprise customers can influence product roadmap and request feature prioritization

features.name: crossmint partner network access
features.description: Access to Crossmint's partner ecosystem for co-selling and integration support

features.name: custom erc20 and spl token support
features.description: Accept or distribute custom ERC20 (Ethereum) and SPL (Solana) tokens in checkout

differentiators: MiCA authorized — full EU regulatory coverage across all 27 countries
Licensed US infrastructure including New York state coverage
Gasless for users — Crossmint pays gas fees and bills operators in fiat
Single platform for wallets, payments, tokenization, and agent finance (no vendor fragmentation)
250+ plug-ins for agentic use cases (data feeds, trading, commerce)
Agentic payments infrastructure — agents can hold, send, and spend money autonomously

pricing_signal.free_tier: 1,000 monthly active wallets free; up to 2,000 wallet transactions; tokenization developer tier with 100 minting actions/hour; hosted checkout with standard analytics
